login.title: Log in to Surface

login.profileFetchFailed: Signed in, but the app could not load your profile. Check the API URL (VITE_API_URL) and CORS (CORS_ORIGINS), then redeploy.

forgotPassword.resetLink: Email me a password reset link

forgotPassword.resetSuccess: If an account exists for that email, we sent a password reset link. Use it to choose a new password.

authCallback.noProfileBody: You're signed in with this email, but there is no user profile in Surface. Ask an administrator to create your account.
authCallback.linkExpired: Could not complete sign-in. The link may have expired — request a new magic link.

resetPassword.notRecoverySession: Use the password reset link from your email to open this page. If you are still signed in as another account, sign out first, then open the link again.
resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.subtitle: Your feedback history and open cycles. Select one to get started or view results.
feedback.noTeam: You're not in a team yet. Ask an admin to assign you to a team.
feedback.noCycles: No feedback cycles yet. Ask your admin to create one.
feedback.cycleNotFound: Cycle not found. It may have been removed or you may not have access.
feedback.anonymousRant: Speak your mind about the team
feedback.openTeamFeedbackSubtitle: Speak your mind about the team
feedback.rantTeaser: Your message is anonymous. Surface routes relevant insights to the right person and to the whole team.
feedback.rantPrompt: Share any observations or feedback that is on your mind. Talk about the team chemistry and how the overall team performs. There are no rules. Your message is anonymous and Surface will route the relevant insights to the right person and to the entire team.
feedback.rantSubmittedBody: Your response has been recorded. It will be processed and appear in cycle themes and the compiled summary after the cycle closes. If you mentioned teammates, relevant snippets may appear in their incoming feedback.
feedback.submitRantCta: Submit open team feedback for this cycle
feedback.cycleCompleteBody: Your open team feedback (if you chose to send it) and structured feedback for everyone are on file. You can still expand a teammate and update a submission until the cycle closes.
feedback.structuredProgress: Rate each teammate (1–5) and save per person. {{saved}}/{{total}} saved.
feedback.structuredTeaserDone: Everyone has a submitted card. Expand to review or update.
feedback.structuredTeaserProgress: Submit once per teammate — your answers are sent to the server when you press submit on each card.
feedback.hintStructuredDoneRantPending: Structured feedback is complete. Submit your open team feedback (above) to finish everything for this cycle.
feedback.noOtherMembers: No other team members in your team yet.
feedback.supportScore: How well does this person perform their role? · Performance (1–5)
feedback.communicationScore: How positively does this person impact the team? · Impact on team (1–5)
feedback.whatHelped: What does this person do well?
feedback.whatHelpedPlaceholder: What strengths, behaviors, or contributions from this person have had a positive impact?
feedback.whatImprove: Where does this person need to improve?
feedback.improvePlaceholder: What behaviors, skills, or habits are having a negative impact on either themselves or the entire team?
feedback.failedSubmitRant: Failed to submit open team feedback
feedback.closedBody: Submissions are closed. Results will be available once your manager compiles and publishes the feedback.
feedback.compiledManagerBody: The compiled results are ready. Head to the insights panel to review and publish.
feedback.compiledEmployeeBody: Your manager is reviewing the compiled feedback. Results will be published soon.
feedback.publishedBody: Your manager has published the feedback for this cycle.

teams.title: Teams
teams.adminOnly: Only admins can view the teams list.
teams.empty: No teams yet. Import users via admin to create teams.

incomingFeedback.noCycles: No cycles yet. Check back after your team starts a feedback cycle.
incomingFeedback.structuredPending: Structured feedback is available after your manager publishes compiled feedback for this cycle.
incomingFeedback.noDirected: No open feedback was directed at you in this cycle.
incomingFeedback.actionsSubtitle: Actions your manager has published specifically for you.

concept.title: The concept
concept.p1: Surface helps small companies collect honest, mostly anonymous feedback from employees and turn it into clear, aggregated themes and actions for managers. The product focuses on enabling "venting" and structured peer/manager feedback while protecting anonymity and giving managers a simple dashboard view of team health.
concept.p2: Employees submit one anonymous rant per cycle (with optional tags) and structured feedback for every other team member. Managers see anonymized themes, example comments (when thresholds are met), and can log multiple actions per theme so the loop closes and people feel heard.
concept.p3: The system uses AI to de-identify text and infer theme and sentiment; all feedback is aggregated into anonymized insights with configurable anonymity thresholds.

presentation.signInPrompt: Sign in to see cycle metrics and participation data.
presentation.title: Presentation
presentation.subtitle: Feedback cycle metrics from your team
presentation.empty: No cycles yet. Create a cycle from the admin or dashboard to see metrics here.

admin.title: Admin controls
admin.createUsersHelp: Supabase emails each new user an invite link to set their password. Match your deployed URL in backend APP_PUBLIC_URL and in Supabase → Authentication → URL configuration (redirects for /auth/callback). For employees, select a manager first — the team will auto-fill from theirs.
admin.createUsersLanguageHint: Choose their app language for the invite — they can change it later in Settings.
admin.inviteLanguageHelp: Language the app uses when they first sign in (default English).

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Preferences for your Surface account.
settings.languageHelp: This applies across the app on every device when you are signed in.
settings.saveFailed: Could not save your preference. Try again.

insights.aiNote: Generated at compile time. Edit or hide before publishing.

insights.reviewSubtitle: Use eye icons to control what the team sees, then publish each section
insights.nothingVisiblePreview: Nothing visible to the team yet. Toggle back to Review to include content.
insights.teamInsightsPlaceholder: Team insights will appear here after the cycle is compiled and published.
insights.noActionsYet: No actions yet. AI suggestions are generated at compile time, or add one manually below.
insights.actionsPublishHint: Actions publish with their respective Team or Individual section

hero.label: AI Leadership Assistant
hero.subtitle: For the first time, the insight you've always needed, surfaced automatically.
hero.mockActionBody: Schedule bi-weekly 1:1s to address communication gaps identified in the last cycle.

problem.label: The Problem
problem.title: People leadership shouldn't stand in the way of profits and growth.
problem.p1: Teams become quietly disengaged as team chemistry deteriorates.
problem.p2: Buried in workload, leaders' efforts never translate into real performance.

stat1.label: Team disengagement goes undetected
stat1.sub: By the time it's visible, the damage is already done.

stat2.label: Performance reviews happen too late
stat2.sub: Annual cycles capture yesterday's problems, not today's reality.

stat3.label: Leaders lack the visibility to act
stat3.sub: Without honest input, decisions are made on incomplete information.

standard.label: A new standard
standard.title: The standard has changed.
standard.footer: This level of insight was previously inaccessible, not for lack of intention, but for lack of the right infrastructure.
before: People development relying on individual manager capacity
after: Honest input from every voice on the team
Aggregated themes surfaced automatically after every cycle
Continuous insight that reflects how the team actually feels today
AI turns input into individual and team development plans at scale

howItWorks.label: Process
howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps to a high-performing team.
howItWorks.step1Body: Invite your team in minutes. Surface handles the structure.
howItWorks.step2Body: Everyone shares structured, anonymous feedback each cycle.
howItWorks.step3Body: Surface translates input into insights and clear development guidance.

outcomes.label: Outcomes
outcomes.card1Title: Clear insight into individual and team dynamics
outcomes.card1Body: Understand exactly where your team stands, updated after every feedback cycle.
outcomes.card2Title: People development scales beyond one leader's capacity
outcomes.card3Title: Teams grow into high performers driving real results

features.label: Product
features.title: Introducing Surface.
features.intro: Surface is a leadership and team development system that turns honest team input into actionable insight and clear guidance, enabling leaders to develop people effectively at scale.
features.f1Body: Structured and unstructured feedback flows from every team member, anonymized before it reaches a manager, so people say what they actually mean.
features.f2Body: Surface clusters themes, weighs sentiment, and identifies signal from noise, turning hundreds of individual responses into a coherent picture of team health.
features.f3Body: AI-generated actions, each editable by the manager, translate insight directly into specific, targeted next steps at both the individual and team level.
features.f4Body: A single place to track historical trends, score movement, open cycles, published actions, and upcoming feedback windows, so nothing gets lost.

team.label: The Team
team.body: We know how difficult it is to develop people without the insight, time, or guidance needed. With backgrounds in computer science and business, we bring a fresh, unbiased perspective that makes high performance happen by default.

cta.subtitle: Run a free pilot. See what your team has been waiting to say.
